Class MyUtils

java.lang.Object
cz.cvut.fel.pjv.mosteji1.poker.utils.MyUtils
public abstract class MyUtils extends Object
Utility class for handling sprite indexing and related constants used for rendering cards and UI elements in the poker game.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    MyUtils.Sprites
    Enumeration of special sprites used in the UI (non-card elements).

      public MyUtils()

  • Method Details

    • getSpriteIndex

      public static int getSpriteIndex(Rank rank, Suit suit)
      Returns the sprite index for a given card rank and suit. The index is computed based on a standard order of ranks and suits.
      Parameters:
      rank - the rank of the card (e.g., ACE, KING)
      suit - the suit of the card (e.g., HEARTS, SPADES)
      Returns:
      the integer index corresponding to the sprite

    • getSpriteIndex

      public static int getSpriteIndex(Card card)
      Returns the sprite index for a given card.
      Parameters:
      card - the card to get the sprite index for
      Returns:
      the sprite index

    • getSpriteIndex

      public static int getSpriteIndex(MyUtils.Sprites sprite)
      Returns the sprite index for a non-card UI sprite.
      Parameters:
      sprite - the sprite enum constant
      Returns:
      the sprite index for rendering
